name: Ubiquiti AirWire
title: Ubiquiti AirWire
description: The Ubiquiti AirWire is a high-performance WiFi 7 client adapter designed to unlock the full potential of modern wireless networks.

detailed_description.heading: Ultra-Fast Connectivity
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti AirWire is a high-performance WiFi 7 client adapter designed to unlock the full potential of modern wireless networks. Built with advanced STR MLO technology, it enables simultaneous full-duplex connections across multiple frequency bands, delivering ultra-low latency and significantly improved real-world throughput. This makes it an ideal solution for demanding applications such as high-resolution streaming, cloud computing, and latency-sensitive workloads. With support for the latest WiFi 7 standard, AirWire provides a major leap forward in wireless efficiency and speed. It utilizes 4 spatial streams and dual-band operation across 5 GHz and 6 GHz, ensuring optimal performance in both congested and high-capacity environments. The device achieves impressive data rates of up to 5.8 Gbps on 6 GHz and 4.3 Gbps on 5 GHz, enabling true multi-gigabit wireless connectivity without the limitations of traditional adapters.

The integrated high-gain antennas further enhance signal quality and range, maintaining stable connections even at longer distances. Combined with advanced MU-MIMO capabilities, AirWire ensures consistent performance when multiple devices are active on the network. Designed as a wireless uplink solution, the adapter eliminates the need for traditional wired backhaul in many scenarios. This flexibility allows users to extend high-speed connectivity to locations where cabling is impractical or costly. Overall, AirWire delivers a powerful combination of speed, efficiency, and reliability, making it a future-ready client adapter for professional and advanced home networking environments.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Network Tools
detailed_description.text:
AirWire is equipped with a range of intelligent features that enhance both performance and usability in complex wireless environments. Its support for multiple WiFi generations ensures seamless compatibility with existing infrastructure, allowing users to integrate the device without replacing current equipment. One of the standout capabilities is real-time spectral analysis, which provides visibility into the wireless environment and helps identify interference sources. This allows for more informed network optimization and improved overall performance. The inclusion of wireless meshing support enables flexible deployment scenarios, making it easier to extend connectivity without relying on additional cabling. The device supports a wide range of channel bandwidths, including up to 320 MHz, maximizing throughput and ensuring efficient use of available spectrum.

This adaptability allows AirWire to perform optimally in both dense urban environments and less congested areas. For connectivity, AirWire features a 5 GbE interface via USB 3.2 Gen2, providing high-speed data transfer between the adapter and the connected system. This ensures that the wired interface does not become a bottleneck, even when operating at multi-gigabit wireless speeds. Management is handled through a USB-C interface, offering a modern and convenient way to configure and monitor the device. Additionally, a built-in status display provides real-time information about device operation, simplifying troubleshooting and monitoring. These features combine to create a highly adaptable and intelligent wireless client solution that meets the needs of both professional deployments and advanced users.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Durable
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti AirWire features a compact form factor that allows for easy integration into a wide range of setups. With dimensions of just 117 x 117 x 42.5 mm and a weight of 537 grams, the device makes it suitable for both fixed installations and mobile use cases. Its enclosure is constructed from durable polycarbonate, providing a balance between lightweight design and structural integrity. This ensures long-term reliability while maintaining ease of handling and installation. Power is delivered via USB Power Delivery, supporting multiple voltage profiles for flexible operation. The device can operate in standard mode or switch to a higher performance mode when additional power is available, allowing users to optimize between energy efficiency and performance. Maximum power consumption remains low, ensuring cost-effective continuous operation.

AirWire is built to operate reliably in typical indoor environments, with support for a temperature range from -10 to 40° C and humidity levels from 5 to 95 percent non-condensing. This makes it suitable for a variety of deployment scenarios, including offices, labs, and controlled industrial environments. The device integrates seamlessly with the UniFi Network platform, requiring version 10.2 or later for full functionality. Compliance with international standards and certifications further ensures compatibility and reliability across different regions. Altogether, AirWire combines compact design, efficient power usage, and dependable performance, making it a versatile and robust choice for modern wireless connectivity needs.
